reviews.review_description: I wanna teach more players then i used to and i wsnna see the extension of this game overall this was like perfect but when i asked my friend to play thus game we were in  a seperate lobby so we new that the devs took a away muktiplayer
It's like wupraland but in vr (I had supralsnd for 4 years)

Nice supraland fangame, cool level design. It doesn't have a complete supragames feel, but it does remind me of playing supraland in 2021. (for those who think there should be credits: it is against meta's policy to link other games that are not by the same company)

reviews.review_title: Game is unique but very Buggy
reviews.review_description: The game has a awesome art style and is well made, the only drawback is that you get soft locked at the second area of the game and cannot continue.
such a FUN experience. I didn't expect to have much fun at all, but there's so much exploration and uniqueness to it that it'd feel like a crime to give anything lower than 5 stars
supraland is so nostalgic for me, and this brings that back

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! glad you liked it!

reviews.review_description: Brings back a lot of old memories from all different kind of games. Really fun and great to explore!
It’s a really fun game but also short, I know that it’s new but I can’t WAIT until Gandalf (the creator) adds more levels! 🔥🔥

This game is so great! It's different from a lot of VR games I've played, and I love the puzzle aspect of it. The game has such a happy vibe, and me and my friend had a great time playing it together. It reminds me of some other games I've played before, and I like that a lot. It's very unique, and I'm actually invested in the game, unlike most free games I get where I just drop them in a few days. I'm really hoping this game gets more attention in the VR community, and I can't wait to see what updates are to come!
I love doing the puzzles and searching for all chests and coins yall should play it.
Has a good community and with puzzles
very sigma game by sigma man, im gonna go nuke a home now
Gandalf told me to review it 5. Stars

reviews.review_title: Gorilla tag w supraland asset rips
reviews.review_description: Just straight up a bad gorilla tag clone that stole assets and world design from supraland. Truly wild to see, lol. At least it's free I guess
this game is an awful recreation of Supraland for vr, i demand the developers to put Supraland in the description of the game. GO PLAY SUPRALAND NOW!!!
